cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Lockdown Mode for Data Protection
cards.body: OpenAI launched Lockdown Mode to reduce prompt injection attack risks and protect sensitive data in ChatGPT. While vulnerabilities may persist, the feature aims to minimize unauthorized data sharing during conversations.

cards.title: Google Pays SpaceX $920M Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Google signed a major deal with SpaceX worth $920M per month for computing resources. The agreement stems from unexpected demand for Google's recently launched AI products.

cards.title: Anthropic's Revenue Crosses $47 Billion Annualized
cards.body: Anthropic announced annualized revenue hit $47 billion in May, skyrocketing from $9 billion at end of 2025. The AI company faces a real test as it heads toward its IPO.

cards.title: Apple Approves First AI Agent for Messages
cards.body: Poke became the first AI agent approved for Apple's Messages for Business platform. The startup enables users to interact with AI agents through simple text messages.

cards.title: Meta Builds AI Data Centers in Tents
cards.body: Meta found a way to slash massive data center costs by constructing facilities in tents. This unconventional approach addresses the company's surging infrastructure expenses.

cards.title: Meta Launches AI Creator Assistant on Facebook
cards.body: Meta rolled out a new AI assistant helping creators get quick answers about performance metrics and posting strategies. Creators can ask questions like "When should I post?" without parsing charts manually.

cards.title: OpenAI Still Building 'Super App' Platform
cards.body: OpenAI continues developing a "super app" beyond chat functionality, according to senior employees. The company is signaling a strategic shift in its product direction.

cards.title: Notion Restores Access to Anthropic Service
cards.body: Notion restored access to Anthropic after experiencing service disruption. Notion's product head expressed surprise at the social media response to the outage.

cards.title: AirTrunk Commits $30B to India AI Data Centers
cards.body: Australian data center operator AirTrunk announced a $30 billion investment to build 5GW of AI data center capacity in India. The expansion addresses growing computational demands in the region.

cards.title: Airbnb CEO Launches New AI Lab Initiative
cards.body: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab for the platform. Chesky previously stated existing LLM partnerships weren't mature enough for integration.

cards.title: Trump Administration Eyes OpenAI Equity Stake
cards.body: President Trump stated he's discussing deals allowing Americans to benefit from AI company success. The administration is considering taking an equity position in OpenAI.

cards.title: White House AI Advisor Sriram Krishnan Departs
cards.body: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor. He's reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

cards.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
cards.body: Major AI companies plan IPOs that could drive significant price increases across the industry. The move signals a shift toward monetizing AI at scale.

cards.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after disruption
cards.body: Notion's service interruption affecting Anthropic access generated substantial social media attention. The restoration highlights integration challenges between AI platforms.

cards.title: OpenAI shifts strategy with 'super app' development
cards.body: OpenAI is moving beyond chat-based interfaces toward a comprehensive super app. A senior employee declared "Chat is dead" as the company evolves its product strategy.

cards.title: OpenAI launches Lockdown Mode for data security
cards.body: Lockdown Mode protects sensitive data from prompt injection attacks in ChatGPT. The feature reduces vulnerability risks though doesn't eliminate them entirely.

cards.title: Google pays SpaceX $920M monthly for compute
cards.body: The unprecedented deal reflects skyrocketing demand for Google's AI products. Unexpected computational needs are driving major infrastructure investments.

cards.title: Token costs spiral: AI industry demands cost controls
cards.body: The conversation shifted from aggressive growth to implementing guardrails. Industry leaders now prioritize managing runaway AI computational expenses.

cards.title: AirTrunk commits $30B for Indian AI data centers
cards.body: The Australian operator plans 5GW capacity specifically for AI workloads in India. This signals major infrastructure expansion to support AI demand.

cards.title: Anthropic revenue hits $47B annualized, eyes IPO
cards.body: Anthropic's revenue skyrocketed from $9B to $47B in just months. CEO Amodei downplays concerns about AI ROI ahead of public markets debut.

cards.title: Airbnb CEO plans new AI lab, seeks partnerships
cards.body: Brian Chesky announced intentions to launch a dedicated AI research lab. The company previously delayed LLM partnerships waiting for better solutions.

cards.title: Poke becomes first AI agent on Apple Messages
cards.body: Apple approved Poke as its inaugural AI agent for business messaging. The startup enables users to deploy AI assistants via text.

cards.title: Meta rolls out AI assistant for content creators
cards.body: Creators can now ask AI questions about posting times and audience feedback. The assistant simplifies analytics interpretation for Facebook creators.

cards.title: Meta's AI security flaw exposed customer accounts
cards.body: Attackers exploited Meta's AI support agent to steal Instagram accounts by requesting email linking. The breach included high-profile accounts and reveals AI security gaps.

cards.title: AI chatbots may be rewiring our brains
cards.body: Psychologist Gloria Mark warns that constant AI interaction may impact cognitive control. Research suggests digital technology interaction patterns are fundamentally changing.

cards.title: Courts overwhelmed by AI-generated lawsuits
cards.body: Judges report a flood of poorly drafted AI-generated legal documents from pro se litigants. Courts struggle to manage volume while maintaining justice access.

cards.title: Google partners on virtual power plants for AI
cards.body: Google signed a deal with Voltus for virtual power plant support in major US grids. The agreement helps finance distributed energy resources powering data centers.

cards.title: Small businesses leverage AI for operations
cards.body: AI tools now handle accounting, design, and market research for small firms. The technology democratizes business functions previously requiring specialized staff.

cards.title: Agentic AI could transform global healthcare
cards.body: AI agents address critical gaps in healthcare provision and staff shortages. Automated systems enable better resource allocation in underinvested sectors.

cards.title: AI gun detection system fails school shooting case
cards.body: A school shooting survivor sued an AI detection firm for missed weapon identification. The case highlights safety risks of automated security systems.

cards.title: S&P 500 blocks SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic
cards.body: Index providers rejected several prominent AI and aerospace firms from S&P 500 inclusion. The decision reflects ongoing criteria debates around new tech companies.

cards.title: Fitbit Air wearable burdened by chatty AI coach
cards.body: The device combines fitness tracking with an overly talkative AI coaching assistant. The intrusive AI feature diminishes the otherwise solid wearable experience.
